title: Saturday Clean-Up
synopsis: A family works together to clean the house and discovers that chores can go faster with music.
sentences: Every Saturday morning, Noah's family cleaned the house together.
Noah usually complained before the work even began.
This week, his mother turned on lively music in the living room.
His sister dusted the shelves while Noah picked up books and toys.
Their father carried laundry upstairs and opened the windows for fresh air.
At first, Noah moved slowly and watched the clock.
But then his favorite song came on, and he started singing while he worked.
Soon he was racing his sister to see who could finish first.
The rooms looked brighter after the floor was swept and the cushions were straight.
When the work was done, the family sat down for juice and biscuits.
Noah looked around and felt proud of what they had done.
He still did not love chores, but he liked how good the house felt afterward.
